content: Looking for fresh RDP access to healthcare companies in EU. Willing to pay 50k in BTC or XMR for full admin.
New LockBit variant is ready. Encrypts 2x faster. Contact me via Jabber: king@exploit.im. Anyone targeting example-corp.com?
Selling combo lists. 10M records from latest breaches. Validated against major banking sites. PM for details. Also selling zero-day for CVE-2026-0001.
Can anyone help with bypassing Cloudflare on contoso.com? We have the phishing page ready on 192.168.10.45.
Dumping 50GB of internal documents from standard-bank.co.uk. The CISO forgot to secure their AWS S3 buckets. Send 2 BTC to bc1qxy2kgdygjrsqtzq2n0yrf2493p83kkfjhx0wlh for the password.
Selling access to 50,000 infected IoT devices. Perfect for DDoS. IPs range from 104.28.1.0 to 104.28.255.255. DM if interested.
Need an Initial Access Broker (IAB) for any .gov or .mil site. Budget is unlimited. Payment via Monero (XMR) only.
